1.premise: "Talk more during sex" implies dirty talk to the partner, but reveals calling someone else on the phone.

2.premise: A motionless sexual partner could be reframed as a corpse, unlocking burial coin stereotypes.

1.premise: Sex with a motionless partner could be reframed as preparing a corpse for burial.

2.premise: Jewish frugality is so extreme that it extends to reclaiming burial coins after sex.

lines.text: Since my accident my dating life has sucked
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The last summer before it happened man. I was fucking killing it
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was dating one girl told me she wanted me to talk more during sex
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So I did.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And then she got mad and broke up with me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I was like, "I kind of think this is your fault
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because when you told me you wanted me
lines.label: setup

lines.text: to talk more during sex,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you should have specified that it was to you
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and not on the phone."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: - "But you called my dad!"
lines.label: tag

lines.text: - I'm like, "Yeah, 'cause we're, like, cool, you know?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And I feel like you should have known that,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: especially since your dad and I graduated together."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Another girl I dated, she played super hard to get.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And when we finally hooked up, it was at a church.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She just laid there and kept staring at me real weird.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So I had to put coins over her eyes.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Luckily though, she was Asian, so I only had to use pennies.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But if you can't tell, I'm a Jew.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So when I finished, I had to take them back.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Thank you.
lines.label: fluff
